stemHtml: What is correct regarding the read-back of conditional clearances?

options.a: It is compulsory to read-back only the elements of a conditional clearance that can be complied with in full.
options.b: They shall be read back in a manner to clearly indicate that they have been understood.
options.c: They should be replied to only if unable to comply.
options.d: They shall NOT be read back or acknowledged.
